name: Cumin Turkey Tenderloins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, cornmeal, ground cumin, salt, and cayenne pepper.
2. Dip the butterflied tenderloins into the mixture, making sure both sides are well coated.
3. Heat a large non-stick skillet over medium-high heat and add the olive oil.
4. Sauté the coated tenderloins for 3 to 4 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 170ºF (the outside will be golden brown and the inside no longer pink).
5. Remove the tenderloins from the skillet and place them on a cutting board.
6. Slice the tenderloins thinly across the grain.
7. Serve with salsa.
Source:
"National Turkey Federation"
http://www.turkeyfed.org/
